preservedFindings: TypeScript treated POST /plans/:planId/execute as a command and ignored the submitted result body.
TypeScript fabricated success records for every stored action.
Python submitted one real action result to the command route.
A failed Python action could become backend success and sibling actions could receive fabricated success.
Python did not require BackendResponse.ok before completion output or daemon acknowledgement.

outcome: Claim, start, status, bounded-result read, and result submission are distinct authenticated operations.
Runs bind one action to server-selected executor principal/instance, server-derived realm, generation, and immutable snapshot.
Database constraints and transactional locks enforce active-run uniqueness, command/result idempotency, claim ownership, and terminal coherence.
Stale generation, action, or capability evidence is rejected before terminal mutation.
Python uses durable journaled assignment/claim/start/result flow and acknowledges only accepted or proven idempotent durability.

validation.command: focused Phase 2E/CLEAR/MCP/OpenAPI suites repeated three times

validation.note: Workers, packages, TypeScript, aliases, and assets validated.

validation.command: targeted Black, Flake8, isolated mypy, py_compile, and import smoke

details.black: 7 new Phase 2E files unchanged; Python 3.11/3.14 parser compatibility warning retained
details.flake8: 7 new Phase 2E files pass with repository-compatible max-line-length and E203 settings
details.mypy: 4 changed protocol/client source files pass with follow-imports=skip and ignore-missing-imports

validation.command: npm run validate:railway; npm run validate:backend-cli:contract; npm run validate:backend-cli:offline; npm run sync:check; npm run guard:commit
validation.note: sync:check reported 0 errors, 0 warnings, and 5 pre-existing informational recommendations

nonPassingOrUnavailableChecks.reason: No compatible external scanner is installed; commit guard and sanitized staged/cumulative pattern scans passed.
Terminated after more than 35 minutes; the normal parallel repository command subsequently passed twice.
All tests passed but the configured actionPlan.ts per-file coverage threshold failed; targeted schema tests restored 100% before the final passing runs.

dependencyEvidence.conclusion: SCC count, membership, and circular-path count are unchanged; no Phase 2E module joined an SCC.

resolvedBlockers: Moved generation/action/capability freshness validation before terminal result mutation.
Rejected migration URL query parameters and fragments before pg.Client receives the connection string.
independentReview.remainingGateBlocker: Real local PostgreSQL migration evidence remains required before Railway Gate D.

migrationExecution.safety: The runner requires explicit confirmation, loopback authority, arcanos_phase2e_* database name, and forbids URL options/fragments; compensation additionally requires an empty-schema confirmation.
